programme.title: Nazi Collaborators
programme.desc: Anton Mussert was one of the founders of the National Socialist Movement in the Netherlands and worked with the Gestapo.

programme.title: Nazi Collaborators
programme.desc: Greece had a well integrated Jewish community and lost 300,000 citizens thanks to Nazi occupiers; many Greeks collaborated with the Nazis.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: In the run-up to September 1939, political and economic chaos in the aftermath of World War I allowed Hitler in Germany, Mussolini in Italy and ultra-nationalists in imperial Japan to seize absolute power.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Germany took just four weeks to conquer Poland, using a new form of warfare - Blitzkrieg. Six armoured tank units known as Panzer divisions, supported by the Luftwaffe, quickly broke through Polish defences.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: After the retreat from Dunkirk, Churchill rallied Britain in its darkest hour. Hitler was only just across the channel, but he reckoned without our supreme strategist, the might of the navy and the manoeuvrability of the air force.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Explores Hitler's assault on the Soviet Union in the summer of 1941, Operation Barbarossa and his attack on the Caucasus in 1942.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: The attack on Pearl Harbour brought the 'sleeping giant', America, into the war, and saw the emergence of the aircraft carrier as the pre-eminent weapon of the seas.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Mussolini wanted to recreate the Roman Empire, but proved to be a poor military strategist and his incompetence contributed to Hitler's eventual defeat.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: With their armies fully engaged on the battlegrounds, the Allied and Axis powers focused their efforts to develop new weapons and new strategies to deliver a knockout blow to the enemy and bring about a quick end to the conflict.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: War on the two fronts caught up with Hitler leaving him on the run in mid 1943.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler had long been expecting an Allied attack on north-western France, but his problem was knowing when and where it would come. This episode takes a look at the Allied operations Bodyguard and Overload.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Concentrates on Hitler's attempts in the latter end of 1944 to shift the balance of power back in his favour.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific against Japan was a savage hand-to-hand, island-to-island struggle, fought by new specialist fighting units like the valiant Chindits.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Allied forces converge on Germany, uncovering the horrors of Belsen and Buchenwald, before pushing towards Berlin, where Hitler clings to power in his last desperate days.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: With Germany beaten, the Allies turned their attention to Japan, who made them pay for every inch of gained ground. How was this last, great foe overcome?

programme.title: My D-Day: Ken Cooke
programme.desc: Private Ken Cooke, a 78-year-old D-Day veteran, shares his experiences in Normandy with History Hit tell.

programme.title: D-Day: Secrets of the Solent
programme.desc: D-Day saw 453 air sorties from the Solent to support the massive Normandy assault.

programme.title: D-Day
programme.desc: The planning for the Allied invasion on June 6th 1944 took two years and cost thousands of lives, and involved a deception of breathtaking audacity.

programme.title: D-Day
programme.desc: The planning for the Allied invasion on June 6th 1944 took two years and cost thousands of lives, and involved a deception of breathtaking audacity.

programme.title: Victory Remembered, Legacy of The Black Devils
programme.desc: Filmmaker Les Owen travels with former Black Devils and their families to the mountains, beaches and villages of Italy and France to share stories of their bravery, commitment and victories in the face of overwhelming odds.

programme.title: Stalin's French Fighters
programme.desc: 1942: France offered Normandy-Niémen squadron to Stalin, claiming victory, 43 pilots killed.

programme.title: 5 Great Speeches By Allied Leaders On D-Day
programme.desc: Many Allied political leaders and generals delivered remarkable speeches on D-Day, here are 5 of the greatest.

programme.title: Churchill: The Road to Victory
programme.desc: Winston Churchill served as the Prime Minister of Great Britain in arguably some of the most trying times of modern history. After Chamberlain's resignation in 1940, Churchill was appointed during World War II and ultimately led the country down the road to victory.

programme.title: D-Day
programme.desc: The planning for the Allied invasion on June 6th 1944 took two years and cost thousands of lives, and involved a deception of breathtaking audacity.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: By early 1944, Hitler had long been expecting an Allied attack on north-western France, but his problem was knowing when and where it would come. This episode takes a look at the Allied operations Bodyguard and Overload.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Concentrates on Hitler's attempts in the latter end of 1944 to shift the balance of power back in his favour.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: Concentrates on Hitler's attempts in the latter end of 1944 to shift the balance of power back in his favour.

programme.title: World War II in Colour
programme.desc: The war in the Pacific against Japan was a savage hand-to-hand, island-to-island struggle, fought by new specialist fighting units like the valiant Chindits.

programme.title: Pompeii - The Last Mysteries Revealed
programme.desc: Enjoy a journey through time, joining archaeologists as they tread new ground and search for new secrets in one of the world's most fascinating places - Pompeii. (1 of 2)

programme.title: Pompeii - The Last Mysteries Revealed
programme.desc: Archaeologists continue their exploration of Pompeii, uncovering the secrets of this fascinating ancient city, with surprises to be found and trouble ahead.

programme.title: Secrets of Great British Castles
programme.desc: Historian Dan Jones is in the heart of Snowdonia exploring a stronghold built not only as an impenetrable fortress but also as a lavish royal palace fit for a fairytale - Caernarfon Castle.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Ages of Bronze and Iron to discover what kind of a place Britain was before the Romans invaded. With no written history, only archaeology can provide the clues. Alice uncovers a world that is complex, sophisticated and pretty strange. She examines the two Hebridean Bronze Age skeletons known as the Cladh Hallan Mummies.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts follows an entire year of British archaeology, joining up the results of digs and investigations the length of the country. The results are astonishing, and sometimes disturbing. Roman finds include the mystery of 97 babies murdered by the Thames, a fabulous Roman coin hoard found in Somerset and a man buried on a layer of dead animals.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In Norfolk, flint tools unearthed recently push the earliest human occupation back by 200,000 years, to around one million years ago. In Orkney an early farm yields glimpses of our ancestors' earliest religious beliefs and customs.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Skeletons tell of both violent death and tenderness at the royal seat of power in Bamburgh, Northumbria, while at a remarkable community project at a shopping centre in Sittingbourne, people curate the grave goods of their own ancestors.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In the final episode Dr Alice Roberts goes in search of the Tudor age, a time that saw momentous changes across all aspects of British life. Along the way Alice visits excavations at Shakespeare's first theatre in London's Shoreditch, where the Bard began his career and `Romeo and Juliet' was first performed. Alice also joins a team sifting through Shakespeare's rubbish at his last home in Stratford-Upon-Avon.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Focusing on Roman Britannia, where finds include the thickening mystery of 97 baby skeletons found by the Thames, a newly discovered town in rural Devon that turns history on its head, and a Roman cult figure buried for 1700 years beneath a fort.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Viking Age in Britain and visits excavations that are revealing a different side to these seafaring pirates from Scandinavia. She looks for signs of the earliest Viking settlers in the Outer Hebrides, and in Orkney - where Viking dominance outlasted anywhere else in Britain - she visits the excavation of a Viking chief's citadel and finds evidence of their way-of-life.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: It's a family affair for all three property projects in Port Talbot, Wimbledon and Telford. A father and daughter, cousins and a father and his two stepsons tackle projects bought at auction from just over £20,000 to more than £1.2 million.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy enjoys a day by the seaside visiting a two bedroom maisonette a few steps from the water in Kent's Leysdown-on-Sea, while Martin has a look at a terraced house in Cymmer in the Welsh Valleys and a two bedroom mid-terrace in Penkhull near Stoke.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin looks around a terraced house in West Bromwich and another in Telford, while Lucy checks on progress 18-months after she first visited a bungalow on a large plot near Gillingham in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin visits a two-bedroom flat in Budleigh Salterton and a three-bed terrace in Downpatrick, Northern Ireland, which needs a new lease of life. Lucy meets the buyer of a plot of land in Abbey Wood, London, who has big plans for its future.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Lucy catches up with a developer she met three years ago. This time he has an ambitious project turning two flats in a Victorian house in Hounslow into three. Martin meets two first-time developers working on projects in Glasgow and Tipton.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A flat in Edinburgh, a 1930s terraced house packed full with original features in Bromley in Kent and a five-bedroom house in Exeter in danger of falling down are all sold under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A smart looking terrace with an expensive problem to fix in Pontygwaith in Wales, a large Victorian house in Okehampton in Devon and an old pub in Sittingbourne in Kent all go under the hammer.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin visits a listed shop in Hodnet in Shropshire and a property developer working on a maisonette in Ferndale in South Wales. Lucy follows a five-year project to restore a 17th-century listed building in Margate in Kent.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Martin and Lucy go flat-tastic looking around buildings which developers hope will create around a dozen flats. The properties sold under the hammer are in Stoke in Staffordshire, Bexleyheath in Kent and Gunnislake in Cornwall.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: A five-bedroom house in Plymouth, a two-bed Victorian cottage in Croydon and a former coach house in Cardiff are sold under the hammer. Martin and Lucy meet the developers to hear about their plans to make the most of their auction buys.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer

programme.title: Two and a Half Men

programme.desc: IT Manager David is hoping to bag the £1000 prize with his French evening, but his main challenge is to keep all the guests on friendly terms. Can he keep Ashleigh and Tina away from each other's throats?

programme.title: Teen Mom OG
programme.desc: For four seasons fans of `Teen Mom' watched Farrah, Maci, Amber and Catelynn face multiple challenges in their first years of motherhood, including such things as graduating from high school, relationships, getting jobs, beginning college and moving out on their own. Oh, and raising their first child. Now the original girls - hence, the `OG' in the revived series title - return to reveal the challenges of raising children on camera, and how life in the public eye has shaped them as parents and people. It's an unprecedented view of young mothers facing the responsibilities of parenthood as their children enter kindergarten, start little league and reach other milestones of youth.

programme.title: The Adventures of Paddington
programme.sub-title: Paddington's Journey Into a Black Hole; Paddington's Rainbow Race!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and Rebecca Rabbit pretend to be babies to get Mummy Rabbit's attention. Mummy Rabbit plays along until they admit they are not really babies!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa is on a play date with Candy Cat at Mr Cat's Cafe. Candy show Mr Cat the drawings they've done of everyone, and he hangs them up for everyone to see.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: On a cold day, Daddy Pig suggests they build a den until Mummy Pig has finished work. After a hard day's work, the cushion den is a perfect place to watch TV together!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A curious, naive, yet friendly little pig navigates through her life with her friends and family by her side. Guided by her loving mother and brash father, Peppa is stuck almost every day. Her little siblings, however, look up to Peppa lovingly.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and family are watching TV... until it breaks! While Grampy Rabbit fixes it, the family get a new TV which can do everything... but it doesn't beat their old TV.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: A storm cancels Peppa and her family's adventure plans so they decide to take it inside. Using their imagination, they go sledding, climb a mountain and have a campfire in the attic.

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are playing in their pool. They help the garden animals cool down but when it rains, the animals are happy and so is Peppa. Rain makes muddy puddles for jumping in!

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and George are in Granny and Grandpa Pig's Garden. Granny's friends are playing folk music! They play music for Grandpa Pig and then Grandpa Pig makes apple juice for everyone!

programme.title: PAW Patrol

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: When Erin Chorney disappears, suspicion falls on her ex-boyfriend Michael Bridges, the last person to have seen her. After investigators' searches come up empty-handed, they orchestrate an operation to woo Bridges into confessing her whereabouts.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On the outskirts of Nashville, Mich., Rodney Fancher's bullet-ridden body is found in a ditch. The hunt for a killer begins, pulling in police forces from across the state. As the case starts to turn cold, a startling confession emerges.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: In the small community of Gormania, W.Va., Cathy Ford receives a mysterious phone call and is reported missing that same evening. A burnt car, blood-soaked trailer and a secret a?air all point to the idea that Cathy did not disappear willingly.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: James Duncan's family's search for him halts when the details of his murder are revealed, and they are almost as shocking as the murderer's identity.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Investigators, family, and the small town of Logan race against the clock to bring Summer Inman home alive after she is violently abducted.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: When a quiet bachelor lets a mysterious woman into his life, the results are disastrous for both him and his family.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: When Jake Millison vanishes without a trace, his loyal friends stop at nothing to unearth the shocking truth behind that fateful night.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: When a revered small-town physician lies about his whereabouts the night of his son's murder, police investigate the death of his other son seven years earlier.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: A motel housekeeper in Oakley, Kan., discovers the body of her co-worker Alice Pepperl; the room lacks hard evidence to point to a suspect, but a special coin taken from the cash register could be all it takes.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: Investigators hunt a sexual sadist who stalks and preys on young mothers in Sioux Falls, S.D.

programme.title: Heartland Homicide
programme.desc: On New Year's Eve in Cooperstown, North Dakota, an intoxicated Kurt Johnson is given a ride home from a local bar. When it's discovered that Kurt never arrived home, authorities begin their search, and what they uncover shocks them to their core.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: The chilling secrets of the Mafia's most notorious kingpins are exposed in this compelling series. Mobster Sam Giancana was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lucky Luciano's crimes with the Mafia, including bribing high-ranking officials, got him 50 years in jail. However, when WWII broke out, the USA needed Luciano's help.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Lifting the lid on notorious mobsters. Joe Colombo loved fame and money and took on the FBI in the 70s, with his Italian-American Civil Rights League campaigning against harassment.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ambitious John Gotti became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head and earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.sub-title: Tony Spilotro - The Las Vegas Enforcer
programme.desc: Enforcer Tony `The Ant' Spilotro left dozens of bodies in his wake as he protected the Chicago Outfit's interests in Vegas casinos. Soon he became a target of the FBI and the Mob.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Tales of real-life crime told by the FBI. Vito Genovese dealt with disloyalty ruthlessly and rose through the Mafia ranks, but he was to cause his own downfall with a massive error.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Carmine Galante took the Mob into the world of heroin and even when locked up in jail, Galente still managed to control the streets and profit from his drug empire.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Ex-FBI agent Joe Pistone, who infiltrated the Mafia for six years as mobster `Donnie Brasco', reveals how his undercover work led to over 100 convictions.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Financier Allen Dorfman used union pension funds to bankroll the Mafia and the FBI quickly realised they could bankrupt the Mob by pursuing Dorfman.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Joe Valachi was the first Mafia member to break the Mob's code of silence and turn public informer, revealing the term `Cosa Nostra' to the world.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Gambino family soldier Roy DeMeo and his crew were suspected of killing dozens of people and dismembering their bodies, but the FBI and other mobsters were soon on his trail.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits
programme.desc: Meyer Lansky was an associate of `Lucky' Luciano and linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him - or find his riches.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits

programme.desc: Cyfres Garddio yng nghwmni Meinir Gwilym, Sioned Edwards ac Adam Jones. Flowers, veg and all life's good stuff, with the team.

programme.title: Dechrau Canu Dechrau Canmol
programme.desc: Cyfres o ganu mawl ac addoli, a chyfle i gwrdd ag amryw bobl ddiddorol yng Nghymru. Series with hymn singing and worship, and a chance to meet various interesting people in Wales.

programme.title: Y Sioe Fwyd
programme.desc: Presenter Ifan Jones Evans and chef Hywel Griffith are joined by Aeron Pughe.

programme.title: Cynefin
programme.desc: Cyfle i fynd ar drywydd rhai o straeon difyr a chudd gwahanol rannau o Gymru. Visiting different areas of Wales and featuring quirky and lesser-known local stories.

programme.title: Dylan Ar Daith
programme.desc: Dylan Iorwerth visits a small village in Italy for the opening of a museum to commemorate the work of Benjamin Piercy. Piercy's name is not familiar in modern day Wales but he made a huge contribution here a century and a half ago.

programme.title: Busnes Bwyd
programme.desc: Mae'r cystadleuwyr yn ymweld gyda phobty Crwst, ac yn gweithio fel tîm i greu bocsys llawn doughnuts. The team visit Crwst bakery in Cardigan and work as a team to create doughnut boxes.

programme.title: Y Castell
programme.desc: Jon Gower traces the story of the castle, here in Wales and across Europe. How do you defend a castle? Throughout its history, the castle's architects worked tirelessly to ensure it was strong enough to withstand the fiercest attack.

programme.title: Ralio
programme.desc: Uchafbwyntiau Pencampwriaeth Rali'r Byd - ac fe fyddwn ni'n cadw llygad barcud ar y gyrrwr rali o Gymru, Elfyn Evans. Highlights from the World Rally Championship.

programme.title: Ffermio
programme.desc: Cyfres sy'n edrych ar y byd amaeth, yn cynnwys rai o bynciau llosg y diwydiant. A series exploring the world of agriculture across Wales.

programme.title: Pobol y Cwm Omnibws
programme.desc: Cipolwg yn ôl dros ddigwyddiadau'r wythnos yng Nghwmderi. Omnibus edition looking back at events in the fictional village of Cwmderi over the past week. With on-screen English subtitles.

programme.title: Newyddion S4C a'r Tywydd
programme.desc: News and weather.

programme.title: Dechrau Canu Dechrau Canmol

programme.title: Am Dro!

programme.title: Y Stwidio Greffau

programme.title: Sain Ffagan

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Arguably the first supergroup, Cream featuring Ginger Baker, Jack Bruce, Eric Clapton, lyricist Pete Brown, artist and lyricist Martin Sharp, producer Felix Pappalardi and legendary engineer Tom Dowd, achieved massive worldwide success and ensured their place in rock's hall of fame with `Disraeli Gears' in 1967. With interviews musical demonstration, acoustic performance and archive footage.

programme.title: Painting Birds with Jim and Nancy Moir
programme.desc: Jim and Nancy are off to North Wales to catch a glimpse of the black grouse, one of the most endangered birds in the country and at risk of extinction, as the couple set out to put their trip to canvas.

programme.title: Pavarotti in Central Park
programme.desc: Luciano Pavarotti performs in Central Park with flutist Andrea Griminelli, members of the New York Philharmonic and the Boys Choir of Harlem.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A young couple run into trouble when they decide to treat their ailing child with a home-made remedy.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A deadly snake has a starring role in this terrifying tale set in the steaming heat of Kashmir.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A fast-car enthusiast runs into trouble after picking up a trampish hitchhiker.

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: After the deaths of their first three children, a husband and wife are finally blessed with a child, but will this one also meet an untimely end?

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man who fantasises about conducting an orchestra is joined by a young woman for a musical evening in an empty concert hall, but events take a sinister turn when her true motives come to light.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An ambitious Hollywood actor (George Segal) convinces his lover (Anne Baxter) to kill her husband, then makes a phone call.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: After his son's murder, a zealot (R.G. Armstrong) becomes obsessed with capturing the killer. With Dick York.

programme.title: Classic FM Live - Great British Classic's
programme.desc: A celebration of great British classics.

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Charles Laughton, the Yorkshire-born stage and film actor who starred in The Old Dark House and Mutiny on the Bounty.

programme.title: Classic Movies: The Story Of
programme.sub-title: Classic Movies: The Lion In Winter
programme.desc: Peter O'Toole delivers a memorable performance as King Henry II in a tale of palace intrigue bolstered by a stellar cast, including Anthony Hopkins.

programme.title: Queen: Is This the Real Life?
programme.desc: The highs and lows in the history of `Queen' are explored, featuring unseen photos and interviews with the band, Sir Bob Geldof, Sir Elton John, photographer Mick Rock, Freddie's former partner, Mary Austin, and Freddie's mother, Jer Bulsara.

programme.title: The Eagles: Live From The L.A. Forum
programme.desc: The six-time Grammy-winning rockers take to the stage at the Forum in California over three nights, delighting fans with iconic hits like `Hotel California' and `Take It Easy'.

programme.title: Isle Of Wight Festival 2025
programme.sub-title: Texas At Isle Of Wight Festival
programme.desc: Musicians perform at the Isle Of Wight Festival, one of the UK's oldest music festivals. The event is hosted at Seaclose Park, Newport, in June 2025 and headlined by Sting, Justin Timberlake, and Stereophonics.

programme.title: Billy Idol Should Be Dead
programme.desc: Rocker Billy Idol's journey from underground star to pop icon unfolds in a documentary chronicling his fame, drug use and powerful return to music.

programme.title: Women Who Rock
programme.desc: As questions of authenticity, control, and feminism arise in the '90s, Sheryl Crow, Missy Elliott, Courtney Love, Tori Amos, and Alanis Morissette make music on their own terms.

programme.title: The Great Songwriters
programme.desc: The multi-Grammy winner, formerly of Non Blondes, discusses the art of songwriting and performs a selection of her hits including 'Beautiful' and 'What's Up'.

programme.title: The Great Songwriters
programme.desc: The multi-Grammy winner, formerly of Non Blondes, discusses the art of songwriting and performs a selection of her hits including 'Beautiful' and 'What's Up'.

programme.title: Auction
programme.desc: The art collection of late pop superstar George Michael goes under the hammer at Christie's in a special auction featuring works by Tracey Emin, Damien Hirst and Bridget Riley.

programme.title: Blood for Dust
programme.desc: Travelling salesman Cliff is drowning under the weight of providing for his family and finds himself on a dangerous path after a chance encounter with a colleague who has a dark past. Desperate to keep his fragile home life intact, Cliff agrees to partner with Ricky and run cocaine across Montana.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: An honest Hong Kong cop protecting a Triad boss's girlfriend-turned-informer, finds himself framed for the murder of a dirty cop and going on the run. The movie mixes slapstick with wild stunts and features some painful outtakes during the final credits.

programme.title: Shenandoah
programme.desc: A man's neutrality during the American Civil War is tested by his daughter's marriage and his son's capture by Union forces.

programme.title: XXX 2: The Next Level
programme.desc: NSA Agent Augustus Gibbons, fresh off the success of his last renegade recruitment, once again finds himself in need of an outsider. Gibbons and his new agent must track a dangerous military splinter group that is conspiring to overthrow the US Government in the nation's capital.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Five assassins find themselves on a fast moving bullet train from Tokyo to Morioka with only a few stops in between. They discover their missions are not unrelated to each other.

programme.title: Spider-Man 3
programme.desc: Life is sweet for Peter Parker, MJ loves him, her career is taking off and Spidey-mania is sweeping New York. However, when an alien parasite bonds to his suit, it's not long before the good times and Spidey turn bad. While his ugly ego is taking centre stage, MJ is dumped from her Broadway show, Harry remembers Spider-Man's role in his father's death, and Peter is consumed by revenge.

programme.title: The Meg
programme.desc: A massive creature attacks a deep-sea submersible, leaving it disabled and trapping the crew at the bottom of the Pacific Ocean. With time running out, rescue diver Jonas Taylor must save the crew and the ocean itself from an unimaginable threat: a 75-foot-long prehistoric shark known as the megalodon.

programme.title: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Loose-cannon cops Lowrey and Burnett reduce Miami to rubble as they try to stop Cuban and Russian drug smugglers from flooding Florida with ecstasy.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: London undergoes a citywide evacuation when a World War II bomb is unearthed at a construction site. Amid the escalating chaos, a daring criminal operation is set in motion -- one that uses the evacuation as a cover for a meticulously planned heist.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: Under the watchful eye of mentor Tony Stark, high school student Peter Parker starts to embrace his newfound identity as Spider-Man. When the evil Vulture emerges to cause havoc, everything Peter loves is in jeopardy.

programme.title: Venom: The Last Dance
programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: An amnesiac schoolteacher discovers she was formerly a government assassin when she hires a low-rent private eye to help fill the gaps in her memory. Together, they go on the run in a race against the clock to stop her former taskmasters from putting a heinous plan into action, before they can silence her for good.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: An amnesiac schoolteacher discovers she was formerly a government assassin when she hires a low-rent private eye to help fill the gaps in her memory. Together, they go on the run in a race against the clock to stop her former taskmasters from putting a heinous plan into action, before they can silence her for good.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of 'The Cinema List'. From 'Footloose' to 'The Italian Job', revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Bingeable
programme.desc: On the Cinema List, join us as we explore our favourite franchises to get cosy with, from Transformers to Bad Boys 2. Snuggle down on the sofa and take your pick.

programme.title: The Wedding Banquet
programme.desc: Hoping to stay in the country, a gay man proposes a green card marriage to a female friend in exchange for paying for her IVF treatment. However, things get complicated when his grandmother surprises them with an extravagant Korean wedding banquet.

programme.title: My Dead Friend Zoe
programme.desc: Stuck in a bizarre relationship with her dead, wisecracking Army pal, a veteran reunites with her solitary grandfather at his lake house.

programme.title: The Whole Nine Yards
programme.desc: The wife of a dentist convinces him to betray their new neighbour - a hit man turned informant - to the Chicago gangsters who want him dead. In need of money in order to hurry through a divorce, the young man arranges a meeting with the Mob in which he will exchange information for cash, but when his scheming wife tells the hit man what he is up to, it is the dentist's life that is placed in grave danger.

programme.title: Anchorman 2: The Legend Continues
programme.desc: Ron Burgundy tries to stay classy when he and his team take New York and the nation's first 24-hour global cable news network by storm.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: A recently engaged woman becomes obsessed with meeting the grieving widower she heard on a late night radio show. Sam, the widower, receives hundreds of letters following the radio phone-in which was instigated by his son Jonah.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: Bridget's brand new relationship with Darcy has taken a plummet due to her jealousy of his workmate. Having previously left the publishing house she worked for to avoid her boss, Daniel, with whom she had an unsuccessful romance, she finds him along for the ride on her new job, which takes her to Thailand, and almost into his arms.

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Befuddled mom-to-be Bridget Jones must figure out which of the two men in her life is the father of her child.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: A pair of idiotic friends set off on a madcap journey to return a briefcase to its owner. However, they are blissfully unaware that the case contains a large amount of ransom money for the owner's kidnapped husband. Their trip is soon fraught with disaster, especially when the kidnappers begin to pursue them across the country with the aim of grabbing the cash.

programme.title: Two Weeks Notice
programme.desc: An ambitious law graduate decides to leave her job as she feels her skills are not appreciated by her boss, who basically treats her like his PA. However, he won't let her go that easily.

programme.title: Mamma Mia!
programme.desc: Set on a Greek island, a young woman who is about to be married suspects that any one of three men could be her father. She invites them all to her wedding without telling her mother. Movie adaptation of the musical, set to Abba's greatest hits.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: In 1979 Donna falls in love with Sam while embarking on a series of adventures throughout Europe. In the present day, Donna's pregnant daughter reunites with her mother's old friends and boyfriends on the Greek island of Kalokairi.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A struggling screenwriter finds himself inadvertently entangled in the criminal underworld when his knucklehead friends abduct a mobster's beloved Shih Tzu.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A placid small town is brought to its knees by an infestation of destructive small creatures with a vicious sense of humour.

programme.title: Gremlins
programme.desc: A placid small town is brought to its knees by an infestation of destructive small creatures with a vicious sense of humour.

programme.title: Footloose
programme.desc: A rebellious teen incurs the wrath of a beloved clergyman by challenging the town's ban on loud music and dancing.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Boyz N the Hood
programme.desc: John Singleton's portrait of black youths struggling to survive the poverty and violence of urban Los Angeles. It follows three youths as they confront the reality of life in South Central.

programme.title: Jackie
programme.desc: The days leading up to the tragedy of President John F. Kennedy's assassination and its immediate aftermath are chronicled as they were experienced by the First Lady, wife of the charismatic president and mother of two small children.

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programme.desc: Through a surprising twist of fate, single strangers Sarah and David get to relive important moments from their respective pasts, illuminating how they got to where they are in the present.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: In Tokyo shooting a whisky commercial, middle-aged actor Bob Harris becomes attracted to Charlotte, the young wife of a celebrity photographer. Together they ride out their boredom of hotel life and their bewilderment of the city.

programme.title: May December
programme.desc: Twenty years after their notorious tabloid romance, a married couple buckle under the pressure when a Hollywood actress meets them to do research for a film about their past.

programme.title: Catch Me if You Can
programme.desc: Based on a true crime story about teenage con man Frank Abagnale Jr, who cashed fake cheques worth over $2.5 million while disguised as a pilot, a doctor and a lawyer, and the FBI agent who caught him.

programme.title: Moneyball
programme.desc: Faced with a tight budget, a baseball manager and his partner recruit bargain bin players that scouts have labelled as flawed, but have game-winning potential.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: As the Nuremberg trials are set to begin, a U.S. Army psychiatrist gets locked in a dramatic psychological showdown with accused Nazi war criminal Hermann Göring.

programme.title: Empire of the Sun
programme.desc: Young Jim has to grow up fast after the Japanese invade Shanghai. Separated from his parents and alone in a prisoner of war camp, Jim must fight to survive.

programme.title: A Big Bold Beautiful Journey
programme.desc: Through a surprising twist of fate, single strangers Sarah and David get to relive important moments from their respective pasts, illuminating how they got to where they are in the present.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: At a tough training school for American navy pilots, one of the new intake falls foul of the hard-as-nails drill sergeant, but takes it on the chin, and finds the additional strength to help a fellow student who is feeling the pressure.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: In this version of the classic story - based on the smash Broadway musical - Dorothy is a shy 24-year-old Harlem kindergarten teacher who is brought by a snowstorm to the mysterious Land of Oz, a sprawling, decaying, nightmarish, and dangerous megalopolis that resembles the physical characteristics of New York City.

programme.title: Daddy Day Care
programme.desc: Two fathers get laid off from their well-paid jobs and are forced to stay at home to look after their kids. Seeing the opportunity to make money, the two of them open their own day-care centre. With very little experience and some fairly unconventional ideas on child care, can they really hope to compete against the prim and proper Chapman Academy, which has monopolised the child care industry in their town?

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale about a troubled young boy and his friendship with a captive orca whale named Willy. On bad terms with his new foster parents and set to work in an aquarium under court order, the boy turns to the whale for companionship. When he uncovers a cruel plot by its owner to kill the whale in order to claim a big insurance payout, the lad becomes determined to save Willy's life and release him back into the wild.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: Brothers-in-arms Orion Pax and D-16 become sworn enemies Optimus Prime and Megatron.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: This is the story of a ten-year-old boy named Lucas Nickle, who has just moved to a new neighbourhood, has no friends, and is the target for the local bully and his gang. His parents are leaving for a honeymoon in Puerto Vallarta, so they are too busy to attend to his problems. His sister is distracted by her cellular phone, and the grandmother is obsessed with UFOs and aliens.

programme.title: The Pirates! In an Adventure With Scientists
programme.desc: An inept swashbuckler decides to make an attempt to win the Pirate of the Year Award, and beat his rivals Black Bellamy and Cutlass Liz in a race to plunder the most booty. His journey takes him to Victorian London where the Pirate Captain must choose between winning Pirate of the Year, or helping his crew.

programme.title: Paddington in Peru
programme.desc: Paddington and his adopted family, the Browns, decide to visit his aunt Lucy in Peru, but circumstances lead them towards misadventures in the Amazon rainforest and mountains of Peru.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo
programme.desc: Two years on from going their separate ways after solving their last case, the Mystery Inc crew reunite to investigate the strange goings-on at an amusement park called Spooky Island. The attraction appears to lure its young visitors in very strange ways and it is up to Scooby, Shaggy and the gang to get to the bottom of the mystery.

programme.title: Scooby-Doo 2: Monsters Unleashed
programme.desc: The crime-busting gang, Mystery Inc, and their dopey mutt Scooby-Doo are back, this time investigating the spooky goings-on brought about by an evil genius intent on wreaking havoc in the town of Coolsville.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, a Viking boy named Hiccup defies tradition by befriending a dragon named Toothless. However, when an ancient threat emerges that endangers both species, Hiccup's friendship with Toothless becomes the key to forging a new future.

programme.title: The Wiz
programme.desc: In this version of the classic story - based on the smash Broadway musical - Dorothy is a shy 24-year-old Harlem kindergarten teacher who is brought by a snowstorm to the mysterious Land of Oz, a sprawling, decaying, nightmarish, and dangerous megalopolis that resembles the physical characteristics of New York City.

programme.title: Free Willy
programme.desc: A heart-warming tale about a troubled young boy and his friendship with a captive orca whale named Willy. On bad terms with his new foster parents and set to work in an aquarium under court order, the boy turns to the whale for companionship. When he uncovers a cruel plot by its owner to kill the whale in order to claim a big insurance payout, the lad becomes determined to save Willy's life and release him back into the wild.

programme.title: The Tuxedo
programme.desc: An ordinary cabbie uses gadget-laden formal wear to combat a villain who wants to poison the world's water supply.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Super-Charlie
programme.desc: A young boy attempts to solve an ongoing series of crimes with the help of his super-powered baby brother.

programme.title: Tootsie
programme.desc: An out-of-work actor dresses in drag for an audition, only to land the female lead in a TV soap. When he becomes the most popular character on the show, he feels compelled to carry the persona into his everyday life. While bringing him phenomenal success as an `actress', life as a woman also has its problems - especially when he falls for an actress with whom he works.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Comic tale in which a tough cop is forced to go undercover as a kindergarten teacher. In his new role, he must track down a mother and son who are the only witnesses against a drug-dealing criminal, who is also their husband and father. The cop uses his brutal methods to negotiate the mundane problems of child control.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents' choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthur's loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad!
programme.desc: Hard-boiled incompetent cop Frank Drebin must stop the evil Vincent Ludwig from completing his diabolical plan of killing Elizabeth II.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear
programme.desc: Lt Frank Debrin uncovers a plot by the polluting energy giants to de-rail ecological plans that could render their products redundant. They're led by the evil Quentin Hapsburg who, to make matters worse, is romancing Frank's ex, Jane Spencer.

programme.title: The Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult
programme.desc: Clueless cop Frank Drebin is hauled out of retirement to save the Oscars ceremony from mad bombers. Anna Nicole Smith provides support in this comic sequel.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: On a remote island, a wealthy entrepreneur creates a theme park featuring living dinosaurs drawn from prehistoric DNA. Before opening the attraction to the public, he invites a top palaeontologist, palaeobotanist, mathematician/theorist, and his two eager grandchildren to experience the park. Their park visit is anything but tranquil as the park's security system breaks down, and the prehistoric creatures break out.

programme.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: Sequel in which the entrepreneur who genetically engineered the dinosaurs in Jurassic Park transpires to have cloned more of the prehistoric monsters on another island location. Researchers arrive to observe the creatures in their natural habitat, but hot on their heels is a band of mercenaries intent on capturing the dinosaurs and transporting them back to San Diego Zoo.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish disappeared as a young boy. Nobody believes his friend's story that he was sucked into the game they were playing. Twenty-six years later, two children find the game in their attic, and when they start to play, Alan is released, but the game isn't over yet, and Alan must finish before he is really free.

programme.title: Jaws 2
programme.desc: Another great white shark arrives to terrorise the holiday resort of Amity Island. Having recovered from the grisly events of four years ago, the island is once again packed with tourists. Families are sailing in the bay and swimming off the beach, but when two divers and a water-skier go missing, the local police chief fears that he is about to relive his greatest nightmare.

programme.title: Jaws III
programme.desc: Second sequel to Steven Spielberg's 1970s blockbuster transports the action from Amity Island to a new undersea kingdom attraction in a Florida theme park. The capture of a baby great white shark is big news and brings crowds to the park - until its mother arrives on the scene.

programme.title: Days of Thunder
programme.desc: A hotshot rookie stock car driver sets his sights on the professional NASCAR circuit and the prestigious Daytona 500.

programme.title: About Last Night ...
programme.desc: Two Chicago singles try to build a more meaningful relationship with each other following a one-night stand.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Six years after defeating the Gremlins, Billy and Kate have grown up and moved to New York. However, Billy stumbles across Gizmo in a genetics lab and when he gets wet, all hell breaks loose, and the stage is set for more deliciously bad taste humour.

programme.title: Gremlins 2: The New Batch
programme.desc: Six years after defeating the Gremlins, Billy and Kate have grown up and moved to New York. However, Billy stumbles across Gizmo in a genetics lab and when he gets wet, all hell breaks loose, and the stage is set for more deliciously bad taste humour.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: In the 1930s Chicago, groundbreaking scientist Dr. Euphronious brings a murdered young woman back to life to be a companion for Frankenstein's monster. What happens next is beyond what either of them could ever have imagined.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Remakes
programme.desc: It's time to kick off your Sunday shoes with remakes in this edition of 'The Cinema List'. From 'Footloose' to 'The Italian Job', revisit familiar favourites with a fresh twist.

programme.title: Tafiti: Across the Desert
programme.desc: When his grandfather gets bitten by a snake, a young meerkat embarks on an adventure across the desert to find the magical flower that can cure him.

programme.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
programme.desc: Korpi dismantles the house where his family was murdered and loads it on a truck to rebuild it somewhere safe. He soon finds himself in a violent cross-country chase as the Red Army commander who killed his family comes back to finish the job.

programme.title: Honey Don't!
programme.desc: Small-town private investigator Honey O'Donahue probes a series of strange deaths that are tied to a mysterious church.

programme.title: We Bury the Dead
programme.desc: After a catastrophic military disaster, the dead don't just rise, they hunt. Ava searches for her missing husband, but what she finds is far more terrifying.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: London undergoes a citywide evacuation when a World War II bomb is unearthed at a construction site. Amid the escalating chaos, a daring criminal operation is set in motion -- one that uses the evacuation as a cover for a meticulously planned heist.

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire
programme.desc: On Feb. 8, 1977, disgruntled real-estate developer Tony Kiritsis takes mortgage broker Richard Hall hostage, keeping him tied up in his apartment with a sawn-off shotgun pointed at his chest.

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate for money to save his sick daughter, Ben Richards joins the top-rated show on television, "The Running Man," a deadly competition where contestants must survive 30 days while being hunted by professional assassins.

programme.title: Sisu: Road to Revenge
programme.desc: Korpi dismantles the house where his family was murdered and loads it on a truck to rebuild it somewhere safe. He soon finds himself in a violent cross-country chase as the Red Army commander who killed his family comes back to finish the job.

programme.title: One Last Deal
programme.desc: A veteran sports agent races to secure a final lucrative contract for his star client, as both their careers and lives hang in the balance. Starring Danny Dyer.

programme.title: The Plague
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp, his anxiety spiralling into psychological turmoil over the summer.

programme.title: The Plague
programme.desc: A socially awkward tween endures the ruthless hierarchy at a water polo camp, his anxiety spiralling into psychological turmoil over the summer.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Live Die Repeat: Edge of Tomorrow
programme.desc: A soldier who was killed in action gets caught up in a time loop, in which he repeatedly relives his last battle. However, the more times he fights, the closer he gets to discovering how to defeat the alien enemy.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Acclaimed futuristic chiller about two strait-laced businessmen who go to a theme park in which robots help them live out the adventures of their dreams. While taking part in a Wild West-style saloon shoot-out, one of the robots malfunctions, retaliating in high-noon fashion. Suddenly the men find their lives are in grave danger as they are stalked by a cowboy robot who will stop at nothing to eliminate them.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Big-budget tale of the battle for survival in a world where dry land has disappeared with the melting of the polar ice caps. One man, who has become amphibious, tries to protect survivors on an artificial atoll made from scrap metal by taking on a gang of marauding pirates. He is also intent on discovering if there is any truth in the myth that there is still some land left above water.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: A fleet of ships is forced to do battle with an armada of unknown origins in order to discover and thwart their destructive goals.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: When his father is injured, a youth traverses hostile terrain to recover a rescue beacon.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and plenty of attitude, four women prepare for an epic battle as mischievous ghosts start to wreak havoc in New York.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Men in Black
programme.desc: The secretive Men in Black are agents charged with regulating the aliens who have settled on Earth and ensure that they remain undetected. New recruit J and his partner K must find and stop an intergalactic terrorist bent on assassinating two ambassadors from opposing galaxies before they can make peace.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Men in Black II
programme.desc: Sequel to the sci-fi comedy about a top secret government task force set up to deal with unruly extraterrestrials. An MIB agent turns to the only man who can help him save the world from a rampaging, shape-shifting alien which has taken on the outward appearance of a sexy lingerie model.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Men in Black 3
programme.desc: Agent J goes back to the swinging 60s in a time-travelling mission to save his partner from a murderous alien.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: Men in Black: International
programme.desc: The Men in Black have expanded to cover the globe, but so have the villains of the universe. When aliens that can take the form of any human arrive on Earth, H and M embark on a globe-trotting adventure to save the agency -- and ultimately the world.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: A famous actress calls upon medical science for help when her daughter begins behaving strangely, but without any success. Then, as bizarre and horrific incidents involving the daughter increase, her mother turns in desperation to the Church, and to a priest who doubts his own faith.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: A small group of survivors try to stay a step ahead of the vicious, virus-infected humans that have overrun London.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Nun
programme.desc: When a young nun at a cloistered abbey in Romania takes her own life, a priest with a haunted past and a novice on the threshold of her final vows are sent by the Vatican to investigate. Together, they uncover the order's unholy secret. Risking not only their lives but their faith and their very souls, they confront a malevolent force in the form of a demonic nun.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Cinema List: Spielberg
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List celebrates Steven Spielberg. From the brand-new Disclosure Day to Jurassic Park, these blockbuster adventures are truly tricera-top tier.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk
programme.title: The Lawnmower Man
programme.desc: Visually arresting thriller about a researcher who uses a mentally disabled gardener for ill-advised experiments in inducing mental development through virtual reality simulations. At first, the simulations seem to enhance the lawnmower man's mental powers, but then the experiment goes haywire. Based on a short story by Stephen King.

programme.channel: Sky Cinema Sci Fi & Horror HD.uk

programme.desc: The team head to the apparent safety of the cabin, but Kim must deal with her betrayal - and save her own life.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: When Jeff worries about loner Fat Neil, Abed suggests they invite him to play a game of Dungeons & Dragons; upset after being excluded, Pierce forces his way into the game.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.sub-title: Where in the World Is Karen Walker?
programme.desc: After Will and Grace's parents get married, big changes are afoot for the gang. Will gets a teaching job and a beard, Grace decides to run for office, Jack prepares to settle down with Estefan and Karen goes missing.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: When Jack discovers what song his grandson means to perform at his church talent show, he becomes worried about his safety. Karen faces off with Beverley Leslie about a piece of border wall.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will and Grace reminisce about old times and get into an argument. With the help of Jack and his new found gift, Karen is visited by an old friend who convinces her not to give up on love.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Grace reveals a painful secret to her father; Will and Karen fight for the role of best man in Jack's wedding.

programme.title: Will & Grace
programme.desc: Will discovers that Noah has a child he hasn't told Grace about, but is now sworn to secrecy. Karen and Jack's relationship is tested when she fires him from the play she's producing and replaces him with Jon Cryer.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Andy must step up when his dad loses all his family's money. Then, when Dwight is a guest on a radio show, his co-workers call in to torture him and Kevin learns a secret about Oscar.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: The women of the office try to teach Dwight how to interact with female clients, Angela suspects the senator of cheating and Toby convinces some of the guys to grow mustaches.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: When Angela finds out about her husband's affair, she goes to Dwight for help. Stanley and Phyllis take advantage of Jim when he needs a favour. Pete distracts Pam as she begins painting her mural.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Dwight picks up the slack when the party planning committee fails to plan a Christmas party. Darryl worries Jim has forgotten the promise he made. Pete teaches Erin about `Die Hard'.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: Pam accidentally brings lice into the office but lets Meredith take the blame, Jim spends a great day in Philadelphia with a potential business associate and Nellie, Phyllis and Kevin interfere with Darryl's love life.

programme.title: Ricky Gervais Live 2: Politics
programme.desc: Specially edited film showing the entire performance of `Politics' on Ricky Gervais sell-out UK tour, plus a candid look behind-the-scenes at Ricky's antics on the road.

programme.title: Josh Widdicombe: Bit Much Recorded live at The London Palladium
programme.desc: Recorded live at The London Palladium, Josh Widdicombe performs his stand-up show where he finally tackles the hot comedy topics of advent calendars, weddings and the closing time of his local park.

programme.title: Paul Chowdhry: Family Friendly Comedian
programme.desc: Multi-award-winning stand-up comedian, actor and writer Paul Chowdhry brings hilarity and hijinks to London's Bloomsbury Theatre for his highly-acclaimed show.

programme.title: Avenue 5
programme.desc: When a malfunction occurs aboard the luxury space cruise ship Avenue 5, it's up to engineer Billie McEvoy to warn Capt. Ryan Clark, owner Herman Judd and his right-hand woman Iris Kimura that the incident may have a cataclysmic knock-on effect.

programme.title: Avenue 5
programme.sub-title: And Then He's Gonna Shoot Off...
programme.desc: Rav and her team meet with a NASA representative to plot a potential rescue mission; an engineer working in a hidden part of the ship has a surprisingly optimistic theory about the ship's future; Karen becomes a vocal advocate for passengers.

programme.title: Avenue 5
programme.desc: Judd outlines the plan for a rescue mission and tasks Iris with organising a vigil on Earth to raise the money to fund it; Rav endures a barrage of messages from the ship and handles an unruly press conference.

programme.title: Avenue 5
programme.sub-title: Wait a Minute, Then Who Was That on the Ladder?
programme.desc: With Judd worried about his reputation, Iris arranges a meet-and-greet with several passengers in his luxury suite; frustrated by a bridge crew with no answers, Ryan and Billie bond with the engineers below deck.

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Sabi needs to get paid. Paul is blindsided when Bessy makes a big decision without telling anyone. Strong language/mature themes.

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: Gender fluid millennial Sabi Mehboob straddles various identities, from sexy bartender at an LGBTQ bar, to the youngest child in a large Pakistani family, to the de facto parent of a downtown hipster family.

programme.title: Sort Of
programme.desc: 7ven hosts a cottage weekend for Sabi, Wolf, and Arrow, which is gatecrashed by her mum.

programme.title: Britain's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Exclusive interviews and forensic pathologists and reporters add their own expert knowledge to examine some of the most dangerous and prolific murderers in the UK and worldwide, discovering what drove them to commit such heinous crimes.

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line
programme.desc: Follow US border protection agencies as they man the front lines of national security.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A couple are lucky to be alive after a tangle with a truck, police catch two committed marijuana enthusiasts and a woman blatantly breaks the law in front of the cops.

programme.title: Motorway Patrol
programme.desc: A speeder gets way more than he bargains for, a van and car collide at high speed and an incoherent drunk man heads off to another city on foot.

programme.title: Stop Search Seize
programme.desc: Join Ireland's Customs teams as they, with the help of the Irish police, try to stop organised smugglers from bringing drugs, cars and even exotic animals into the country.

programme.title: UK Border Force

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A good samaritan is revealed to be a violent criminal, a callous thief steals from a child's grave, and biscuit bakers get their sweet revenge on a burglar.

programme.title: Caught Red Handed

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A pair of criminal cousins are committing crimes faster than cops can keep up, a man is robbed just hours after waking from a coma, and a dangerous driver's devious plan is caught on camera.

programme.desc: A look at the life and work of Christopher Nolan.

programme.desc: Exploring MoviePass' founding and the implosion that occurred after outside investors took over the subscription service, rendering the company bankrupt and under investigation.

programme.desc: Behind-the-scenes documentary shedding new light on the exciting and turbulent private lives of Stan Laurel and Oliver Hardy and the genuine friendship between them.

programme.desc: Former Arsenal and France forward Thierry Henry speaks about the individuals that have been an inspiration to him over the course of his career.

programme.desc: Following the journey of the Benetton team from their inception to their first world championship victory in 1994 and the second triumph in 1995, through interviews and archive images.

programme.title: Busby
programme.desc: An intimate portrayal of former Manchester United manager Sir Matt Busby, a football icon who transformed the sport through a career of great talent - and tragedy.

programme.title: Bobby
programme.desc: A dramatic and personal portrait of the man who led England to victory in the 1996 World Cup, with interviews from family, friends and celebrities.

programme.title: Lionesses: How Football Came Home
programme.desc: Going behind-the-scenes the England women's football team's historic 2022 UEFA victory. Through personal home movie footage, archive materials, and exclusive interviews with players and commentators, the women behind the Lionesses are revealed.

programme.title: QPR: The Four Year Plan
programme.desc: In 2007 Queens Park Rangers Football Club, facing relegation and bankruptcy, was rescued by four high-profile billionaires. Their vision: to take a community of reluctant fans, semi-talented players and a roster of ever-changing managers to Premiership glory. The new owners, risking ridicule and commercial failure, allowed cameras to record the extraordinary roller-coaster ride.

programme.title: Stasi FC
programme.desc: Tracing a decade of East German football, survivors of the Cold War tell a story of betrayal, murder, and manipulation in a revealing insight into how the Stasi secret police saw football as more than a game.

programme.desc: The mysterious 52 Hertz whale emits a call unrecognized by other whales, leading to a life of solitude.

programme.desc: Follow a new perspective on the military, political and domestic issues of the time, whilst revealing human stories and engineering marvels.

programme.title: Canadian Pickers

programme.desc: The Nazca lines are hundreds of enormous lines that extend for miles throughout a remote Peruvian desert. Could these markings have an alien connection?

programme.desc: On 19 August 1987, Michael Ryan went on a bloody rampage in the village of Hungerford. Ryan shot and killed 16 people, and his crime would change the face of Britain forever.

programme.title: Crimes That Shook Britain
programme.desc: Peter Sutcliffe became known as The Yorkshire Ripper when he began murdering women in Yorkshire.

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: In Norfolk, flint tools unearthed recently push the earliest human occupation back by 200,000 years, to around one million years ago. In Orkney an early farm yields glimpses of our ancestors' earliest religious beliefs and customs.

programme.title: Rome: Rise and Fall of an Empire

programme.desc: Dr Alice Roberts travels back to the Ages of Bronze and Iron to discover what kind of a place Britain was before the Romans invaded. programme.title: Digging for Britain

Along the way she visits the Channel island of Jersey where she meets a team of archaeologists hoping to shed new light on the much-maligned Neanderthals, and embarks on a kayak survey of the coastline looking for undiscovered sites hidden in the cliffs. At the Natural history museum Alice sees the dark side of our Ice Age ancestors lives.

programme.desc: From the Amazon to the Andes, South America has some beautiful scenery. From guanacos sparring over grassland, to marine iguanas head-butting over a beachhead, to home-stealing hermit crabs, the quest for real estate causes a lot of conflict.

programme.title: Battle of the Alphas
programme.desc: With real-life duelling dragons, giant sumo-wrestling beetles, street-fighting monkeys, and sea turtles that play king of the hill on top of another sea turtle, Southeast Asia boasts a wide range of wildlife warriors.

programme.title: Coral City
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef's main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: Coral City
programme.desc: Feel the heat of summer's arrival as supersize sea snails try to fend off an invading gang of coral-hungry starfish. Accompany reef sharks as they prowl for a midnight meal and marvel at the slippery disguise a parrotfish uses to survive the night.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Jess and Dan catch a keelback snake before it spreads its foul smell. It's a battle of wills as Mick and Adele tackle a python in a drain. And Stu discovers a dangerous snake hiding in the wall of a university.

programme.title: Aussie Snake Wranglers: Deadly Pursuit
programme.desc: Mick and Adele remove two mating eastern brown snakes from a nursing home. Stu and Liv catch a tree snake in the warehouse, while Jess and Dan track down a dangerous intruder.

programme.title: Wolves & Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Ancient Enemies: In Africa, lions and wolves lead their ecosystems. Discover the strength, social strategies and hierarchies behind how they raise and protect their young.

programme.title: Wolves & Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Canids and felines deploy an arsenal of hunting skills. Felines face endurance, while wolves rely on their privileged sense of smell in a constant fight for survival.

programme.title: Wolves & Lions: Old Enemies
programme.desc: Across the planet, wolves and lions lead two legendary predator lineages: canids and felines. We explore their differences and similarities, from brute strength to social intelligence, revealing who dominates in each territory.

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough journeys across the globe to discover how the earliest animals developed on our planet. Attenborough meets expert fossil hunters, and sees on-site some of the most remarkable finds that have transformed our understanding of the first animal life forms, including the first set of eyes and teeth and the first predators and parasites.

programme.title: David Attenborough's First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough's journey continues in Canada's Rocky Mountains, where fossils document an explosion in animal diversity never seen before or since. Travelling on to North Africa, the rainforests of Australia and the east coast of Scotland, Attenborough discovers how animals evolved to conquer not only the oceans but also the land and air.

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough brings the wonders of the Natural History Museum's astonishing collection to life. During a magical, after-hours journey, he brings you closer than ever before to the extraordinary creatures that once roamed our planet.

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: Biologist and conservationist Lizzie Daly ventures into the Pantanal, where she uses the latest tagging technology to gain insights into the fascinating lives of a group of jaguars.

programme.title: Shark Squad
programme.desc: An examination of sharks and their habitat.

programme.title: Wild Dogs
programme.desc: Discover how natural selection and human-made pressures are affecting and influencing canid species across the globe, like the raccoon dog, the golden jackal, and the maned wolf.

programme.title: Wild Dogs
programme.desc: Discover the ways in which natural selection and human pressure have shaped the raccoon dog, the golden jackal and the maned wolf.

programme.title: Jaguar Journals
programme.desc: Biologist and conservationist Lizzie Daly ventures into the Pantanal, where she uses the latest tagging technology to gain insights into the fascinating lives of a group of jaguars.

programme.title: Shark Squad
programme.desc: An examination of sharks and their habitat.

programme.title: High Life in the Dead Mountains
Wild Science
programme.desc: Using CGI, archive footage and science, this series reveals how creatures from deep seas to land predators hunt, survive and dominate nature.

programme.title: Becoming Elephant: The Orphans Of Reteti
Ocean Parks
programme.desc: The Exuma Cays are tiny islands near the Bahamian Capital of Nassau.

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: In the jungles of Thailand, clouded leopard cubs are chasing, climbing, jumping on each other and play fighting. they play these same games over and over again. The more they play, the more they hone their skills and eventually these cubs will become formidable tree-based hunters.

programme.title: Animals at Play
programme.desc: Animal experts take a look at how different kinds of animals play in the wild, each with their own set of rules.

programme.title: Bugs That Rule the World
programme.desc: Scientists and enthusiasts reveal the crucial roles bugs play on the planet and what the future would be without them.

programme.title: Bugs That Rule the World
programme.desc: The colourful world of Earth's essential pollinators -- bees, moths and butterflies.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: In the hot, and humid tropical forests of Southern India, a female King Cobra is on a mission. She needs to find a mate, find food and lay her eggs, all before the monsoon arrives in 5 months time.

programme.title: Into the Wild India
programme.desc: The day-to-day lives and challenges of some of India's most iconic species and creatures.

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: Novice fliers tackle their first ascents, earth-bound creatures soar uniquely and sky masters race with speed, power and agility.

programme.title: Airborne
programme.desc: Each species evolves unique tools to outpace rivals in the eat-or-be-eaten game, taking to the skies is the ultimate advantage.

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: Biologist Patrick Aryee travels to wild locations across the globe to reveal the stories of how each of the world's primate species came to be.

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: Patrick reveals the many diverse species of monkey and learns more about their place in primate evolution.

programme.title: Monkeys: An Amazing Animal Family
programme.desc: Biologist Patrick Aryee examines the new world monkeys from Central and South America and their evolutionary journey dating back more than 40 million years.

programme.title: High Life in the Dead Mountains
Wild Science
programme.desc: Using CGI, archive footage and science, this series reveals how creatures from deep seas to land predators hunt, survive and dominate nature.

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: Using the latest audio technology, David Attenborough explores the crucial role of sound in nature, examining how it shapes and influences the everyday lives of animals, from communication to their behaviour and decisions.

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: From melodic songs to strange hums, David Attenborough sets out to discover the sounds that gibbons, lyrebirds, bull elk, and more use to find a mate and warn off the competition.

programme.title: Secret World of Sound with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough follows baby animals as they communicate in their quest for survival, using sound to beg and call for help in the vulnerable early days of life in the natural world.

programme.title: High Life in the Dead Mountains
Wild Science
programme.desc: Using CGI, archive footage and science, this series reveals how creatures from deep seas to land predators hunt, survive and dominate nature.

programme.title: Matsalu Moose: Wild Giants of the Baltics
programme.desc: Matsalu Bay in the Baltic Sea is an important stopover for migrating birds and home to many rare plant and animal species. For most of the year, moose roam the marshes and plains of Matsalu, which is a nature reserve and under strict protection.

programme.title: How The Wild Things Sleep
programme.desc: Unravelling the secrets of the most extreme sleepers of the animal kingdom; answering why and how animals sleep, how they deal with sleep deprivation and if animals dream.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: On the western coast of Newfoundland, Gros Morne National Park is a place of awe-inspiring natural beauty. Gros Morne is a paradise for hikers with a Mars-like terrain,the result of an earth-fracturing collision of continents nearly 500 million years ago.

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: Exploring the Atacama Desert, the world's driest non-polar region.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: A look at two very different insect species showcasing their expert pollination skills at Nova Scotia's Annapolis Valley. The honey bees and the monarch butterflies.

programme.title: Wild Wild East
programme.desc: A look at the thriving wildlife community that call eastern Canada's largest city, Halifax, home. A number of species have managed to carve a niche for themselves.
